mapper.sql:
a.id, a.office_id AS "officeId", a.name, a.login_name AS "loginName", a.login_pass AS "loginPass", a.email, a.mobile, a.tel, a.ranks,
a.register_date AS "registerDate", a.register_ip AS "registerIp",
a.last_login_date AS "lastLoginDate", a.last_login_ip AS "lastLoginIp", a.login_count AS "loginCount",
a.super_flag AS "superFlag", a.admin_flag AS "adminFlag", a.enable_flag AS "enableFlag",
a.priority, a.remarks, a.create_date AS "createDate", a.create_by AS "createUserId", a.update_date AS "updateDate", a.update_by AS "updateUserId", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", a.sso_login_name AS "ssoLoginName"
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_user a WHERE a.id IN #{item}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user(id, name, office_id, login_name, login_pass, email, mobile, tel, ranks, register_date, register_ip, last_login_date, last_login_ip, login_count, super_flag, admin_flag, enable_flag, priority, remarks, create_date, create_by, update_date, update_by, del_flag, sso_login_name) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{officeId}, #{loginName}, #{loginPass}, #{email, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, #{mobile, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, #{tel}, #{ranks}, #{registerDate}, #{registerIp}, #{lastLoginDate}, #{lastLoginIp}, #{loginCount}, #{superFlag}, #{adminFlag}, #{enableFlag}, #{priority}, #{remarks}, #{createDate}, #{createUserId}, #{updateDate}, #{updateUserId}, #{delFlag}, #{ssoLoginName})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET name = #{name}, office_id = #{officeId}, login_name = #{loginName}, email = #{email, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, mobile = #{mobile, typeHandler=com.github.thundax.common.persistence.entity.DefaultEncryptTypeHandler}, tel = #{tel}, ranks = #{ranks}, admin_flag = #{adminFlag}, enable_flag = #{enableFlag}, priority = #{priority}, remarks = #{remarks}, update_date = #{updateDate}, update_by = #{updateUserId}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, sso_login_name = #{ssoLoginName} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_role(user_id, role_id)
SELECT #{id}, #{roleId} FROM dual
